mapper.select: select a.*, dc.manage_nm from TS_WORK_SW_CONTRACT a left join v_organization_structure dc on a.dept_cd = dc.origin_cd where a.CONTRACT_NO = #{contract_no}

SELECT a.service_no, -- 서비스번호 (SELECT code_text FROM tc_common_code WHERE code_cd = a.service_cd) service_nm, -- 서비스명 a.contract_no, -- 계약번호 a.sub_cd, -- subcode to_char(a.req_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') req_dt, -- 요청일자 to_char(a.proc_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') proc_dt, -- 처리일자 to_char(a.reg_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') reg_dt, -- 등록일자 a.proc_support_cd, -- 처리매체 코드 (SELECT code_text FROM tc_common_code WHERE code_cd = a.proc_support_cd) proc_support_nm, -- 처리매체 (SELECT code_text FROM tc_common_code WHERE code_cd = a.proc_result_cd) proc_result_nm, -- 처리결과 (SELECT code_text FROM tc_common_code WHERE code_cd = a.status_cd) status_nm, -- 진행상태
a.req_contents, -- 요청내용 a.proc_contents, -- 처리내용
ifnull(sub.sw_nm, d.sw_nm) sw_nm, -- 소프트웨어 이름 ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(file_nm SEPARATOR ', ') FROM tc_attach_file WHERE file_id = a.service_no ) AS file_names, a.remark,
ifnull(sub.mgr_dept_comp_nm, org04.company_nm) custom_company_nm, -- 고객사 ifnull(sub.mgr_dept_biz_nm, org04.department_nm) custom_dept_nm, -- 사업부 ifnull(sub.mgr_dept_nm, org04.manage_nm) custom_manage_nm, -- 관리부서
a.req_user_id, -- 요청자 ID ifnull(sub.req_user_nm, b.user_nm) req_user_nm, -- 요청자명 b.user_dept_nm req_user_dept_nm1, -- 요청자 부서 (tc_user.user_dept_nm) ifnull(sub.req_user_biz_nm, org01.department_nm) req_user_dept_nm2, -- 요청자 사업부 ifnull(sub.req_user_comp_nm, org01.company_nm) req_user_company_nm, -- 요청자 회사
a.req_comp_cd, -- 요청한 회사 코드 org02.company_nm req_comp_nm, -- 요청자 회사 (a.req_comp_cd → org.company_nm) org02.manage_nm req_manage_nm, -- 요청한 회사의 관리부서명
a.proc_user_nm, -- 처리자명 ifnull(sub.proc_user_dept_nm, org03.company_nm) proc_company_nm, -- 처리자 회사명
(select point_sum from ts_work_survey where service_no = a.service_no) point_sum, -- 만족도점수
f.cert_cd, (SELECT code_text FROM tc_common_code WHERE code_cd = f.cert_cd) cert_nm, -- 동의여부 f.cert_dt, (case when f.cert_comment is not null and f.cert_comment != '' then '○' else '' end) cert_comment_tf
FROM ts_work_history a
LEFT JOIN ts_work_history_sub sub on sub.service_no = a.service_no
LEFT JOIN tc_user b ON b.user_id = a.req_user_id LEFT JOIN v_organization_structure org01 ON org01.origin_cd = b.dept_cd
LEFT JOIN v_organization_structure org02 ON org02.origin_cd = a.req_comp_cd
LEFT JOIN ts_work_sw_contract e ON e.CONTRACT_NO = a.CONTRACT_NO LEFT JOIN v_organization_structure org04 ON org04.origin_cd = e.dept_cd
LEFT JOIN ts_work_sw_partner c ON c.sub_cd = a.sub_cd
LEFT JOIN ts_work_sw d ON d.sw_cd = c.sw_cd
LEFT JOIN v_organization_structure org03 ON org03.origin_cd = a.proc_dept_cd
LEFT JOIN ts_work_cert f ON f.service_no = a.service_no
WHERE 1=1
and a.req_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
and org03.company_cd = #{userCompCd}
and a.req_user_id = #{userId}
and org04.company_cd = #{userCompCd}
and org04.company_cd in ( select comp_cd from tc_user_mgr_comp where user_id = #{userId} union all select #{userCompCd})
and org04.company_cd = #{customerCode}
and org04.origin_cd = #{departmentCode}
and org03.company_cd = #{partnerCode}
and a.service_no in ( select service_no from ts_work_survey where point_sum is not null and 0 < point_sum and point_sum < 100 )
and d.sw_nm like CONCAT('%', #{softwareName}, '%')
and a.sub_cd like CONCAT('%', #{subCodeText}, '%')
and a.contract_no like CONCAT('%', #{contractNo}, '%')
and e.delete_yn = 'N' and e.contract_year = #{contractYear}
ORDER BY a.reg_dt DESC

SELECT a.service_no, (SELECT code_text FROM tc_common_code WHERE code_cd = a.service_cd) service_nm, a.contract_no, a.sub_cd, a.service_cd, to_char(a.req_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') req_dt, a.req_user_contract_type, a.status_cd, a.req_support_cd, a.req_contents, to_char(a.proc_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') proc_dt, a.proc_support_cd, a.proc_contents, a.proc_result_cd, (SELECT code_text FROM tc_common_code WHERE code_cd = a.proc_support_cd) proc_support_nm, -- 처리매체 (SELECT code_text FROM tc_common_code WHERE code_cd = a.proc_result_cd) proc_result_nm, -- 처리결과 a.remark, a.reg_id,
d.sw_cd, d.sw_nm, ifnull(sub.sw_nm, d.sw_nm) sw_nm,
a.req_user_id, a.req_comp_cd, ifnull(sub.req_user_nm, e.user_nm) req_user_nm, ifnull(sub.req_user_comp_nm, org1.company_nm) req_comp_nm, ifnull(sub.req_user_biz_nm, org1.department_nm) req_dept_nm, org1.manage_nm req_manage_nm,
ifnull(sub.mgr_dept_comp_nm, org2.company_nm) contract_company_nm, org2.department_cd contract_department_cd, ifnull(sub.mgr_dept_biz_nm, org2.department_nm) contract_department_nm, ifnull(sub.mgr_dept_nm, org2.manage_nm) contract_manage_nm,
a.proc_user_nm, a.proc_dept_cd, ifnull(sub.proc_user_dept_nm, org4.company_nm) proc_comp_nm
FROM ts_work_history a
LEFT JOIN ts_work_history_sub sub on sub.service_no = a.service_no
LEFT JOIN tc_user e ON e.user_id = a.req_user_id LEFT JOIN v_organization_structure org1 ON org1.origin_cd = e.dept_cd
LEFT JOIN ts_work_sw_contract b ON b.contract_no = a.contract_no LEFT JOIN v_organization_structure org2 ON org2.origin_cd = b.dept_cd
LEFT JOIN ts_work_sw_partner c ON c.sub_cd = a.sub_cd
LEFT JOIN ts_work_sw d ON d.sw_cd = c.sw_cd
LEFT JOIN v_organization_structure org4 ON org4.origin_cd = a.proc_dept_cd
WHERE a.service_no = #{service_no}
